---
format:
  html:
    quality: 1
  pdf:
    quality: na
  typst:
    quality: 2
    comment: "table only"
  dashboard:
    quality: 1
  docx:
    quality: na
  pptx:
    quality: na
keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        -
          # Georgia is kept; the CSS generic "serif" is dropped (not a real
          # Typst font), leaving a single-element font tuple.
          - '#{set text\(font: \("Georgia",\)\); table\('
        -
          - '"serif"'
---

```{=html}
<table style="font-family: Georgia, serif;">
    <tr><td>A</td><td>B</td></tr>
</table>
```
